Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Altavian Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Altavian Arelius is a member of the House Arelius team and Veris' partner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Altavian Arelius is a sword artist who specializes in Enforcer techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Altavian Arelius uses razor-sharp nails as his Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Altavian is a potential fighter in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Altavian Arelius is a bloodline member of the core House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Altavian leaped over a maze and attacked Yerin with his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Altavian blazed with a silver full-body Enforcement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Altavian wields a goldsteel blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Altavian's full name is Altavian Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Altavian explained the Diamond Veins elixir to Yerin.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Altavian is Veris Arelius's cousin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
